label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 19

extraction.one_line_summary: CONSONNI Simone won flat Stage 19 sprint after late crash at 2.3km eliminated lead-out trains, beating GANNA by 3/4 bike length without organized support
tactical_patterns: Breakaway held at 2-minute maximum on flat stage, suggesting Alpecin-Deceuninck calculated wind risk warranted controlling tempo despite flat profile.
Late crash at 2.3km right-hander eliminated lead-out trains, creating disorganized sprint favoring opportunistic riders without structured position.
GROVES contested intermediate sprint at distance despite being pure sprinter, revealing green jersey vulnerability concerns despite large points margin.

rider_signals.CONSONNI Simone: positive: Won without lead-out train after crash disruption, showing ability to improvise in chaotic sprint situations
rider_signals.GROVES Caden: neutral: Avoided crash injury but crashed bike suggests positional error at critical 2.3km corner with organized lead-out
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: Nearly won bunch sprint despite being time trial specialist, indicating exceptional form beyond TT discipline
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: Did not contest intermediate sprint despite green jersey mathematical possibility, confirming GC conservation priority over points competition
